FitzRoy.text:
Wind
In south, westerly or northwesterly 3 to 5, backing southwesterly 5 or 6 later in northwest. In north, northwesterly backing westerly, 3 to 5, then backing southwesterly 4 to 6 later.
Sea state
In south, moderate, occasionally rough in north. in north, rough occasionally moderate.
Weather
In south, showers, rain later in northwest. In north, showers, rain later.
Visibility
In south, good, occasionally poor later in northwest. In north, good, becoming moderate or poor later.
